name: The Legend of Lumina
short_description: A block pushing puzzle game with metroidvania style progression, set in a serene forest world.
detailed_description:
Explore an ancient forest, push blocks to solve puzzles, and search for a way to end the curse on your land.

The Legend of Lumina is a sokoban style puzzle game with non-linear progression. It's inspired by early Zelda games, with an emphasis on puzzle solving instead of combat.

There are ~50 areas to explore, with nearly all having puzzles, many of which can be solved in different ways.
